popularStory.headline: Memorial
popularStory.description: When Margaret Amos was born in 1505 in Newport Pagnell, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Sir, was 40, and her mother, Jane, was 27. She married William Foultain in 1524 in Gloucester, Gloucesters …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Atwood於1505年出生在英國時，她的父親Nicolas Atwood35歲，母親Agnes33歲。她於1524年與Sir William Porter Jr在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可霍爾哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Atwood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English atte wode (Old English æt thǣm wuda) ‘by the wood’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Atwood was born in 1505, in England, her father, Nicolas Atwood, was 35 and her mother, Agnes, was 33. She married Sir William Porter Jr in 1524, in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She was buried in Holkham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Atwood è nata il nel 1505 nel England, sua padre, Nicolas Atwood, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Agnes, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Porter Jr nel 1524, nel Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Fu sepolta a Holkham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Atwoodが1505年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Nicolas Atwoodは35歳，母Agnesは33歳であった。1524年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアグロウセスターでSir William Porter Jrと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスノーフォルクホールクハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Atwood(이)가 1505년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicolas Atwood(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1524년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 그루스스터에서 Sir William Porter Jr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 홀카에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Atwood nasceu em 1505, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicolas Atwood, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Agnes, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Porter Jr em 1524, em Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela foi sepultada em Holkham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Atwood родилась в 1505 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Nicolas Atwood было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Porter Jr в 1524 г. в местности глоусестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она была похоронена в местности холхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.
